query: SELECT id, status, primaryDomain, JSON_EXTRACT(pipelineOutput, '$.error') as error_msg, JSON_EXTRACT(pipelineOutput, '$.failedAt') as failed_at FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE status = 'failed' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
